data.title: Ubisoft Shares Jump as Tencent Invests $1.25B in New Subsidiary
data.description:
Ubisoft's stock surged by 11% following a strategic partnership with Tencent, which involves a €1. 16 billion investment and the creation of a new gaming subsidiary valued at €4 billion. The post Ubisoft Shares Jump as Tencent Invests $1.
source: https://tokenist.com/ubisoft-shares-jump-as-tencent-invests-1-25b-in-new-subsidiary/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=ubisoft-shares-jump-as-tencent-invests-1-25b-in-new-subsidiary

data.title: Users who participated in the Binance Web3 wallet PARTI new launch have had tokens airdropped to their Binance accounts
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Users who participated in the previous Binance Web3 wallet new project PARTI have now received 88 or 44 PARTI tokens in their exchange accounts. It is recommended that participating users go to their Binance accounts to check the airdrop status. No additional operations are required for this airdrop, and eligible users will directly receive token rewards.

data.title: EU Proposes Capital Rule Requiring Insurers to Fully Back Crypto Holdings
data.description:
The European Union’s insurance watchdog is proposing a stringent new rule that would require insurers to maintain capital reserves equal to the full value of their cryptocurrency holdings.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/eu-proposes-capital-rule-requiring-insurers-to-fully-back-crypto-holdings/

data.title: Darkweb Hackers Claim 100K+ Gemini, Binance User Records
data.description:
Binance denies that the data came from a breach of its systems. Instead, it blames malware on infected user devices. According to Dark Web Informer, a cyber news site covering underground activities, a hacker known as AKM69 is selling a database containing 100,000 records of Gemini users
source: https://www.altcoinbuzz.io/cryptocurrency-news/darkweb-hackers-claim-100k-gemini-binance-user-records/

data.title: Panama: bill introduced to regulate cryptocurrency payments
data.description:
The bill establishes a regulatory framework for digital asset service providers, including custody platforms and exchanges.
source: https://atlas21.com/panama-bill-introduced-to-regulate-cryptocurrency-payments/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=panama-bill-introduced-to-regulate-cryptocurrency-payments

data.title: How to Cash Out Crypto from Any L2 with MetaMask
data.description:
Off-ramping crypto assets can be a problem. In other words, how can you cash out crypto? Especially if you don’t have a bank account. However, MetaMask came with a solution to cash out crypto. It offers to off-ramp your crypto in a couple of ways
source: https://www.altcoinbuzz.io/cryptocurrency-news/how-to-cash-out-crypto-from-any-l2-with-metamask/

data.title: Bitcoin Supply Hits 8-Year Low—Is $138K BTC Price Still in Play?
data.description:
BTC price rebounds as whales buy $11. 2B worth since Mar. 11. Supply falls, ETF flows return, but caution lingers with a $75K pullback risk and a $138K cap in prediction markets
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/03/28/bitcoin-supply-hits-8-year-low-is-138k-btc-price-still-in-play/

data.title: Binance Wallet Integrates Binance Connect for Instant Fiat-to-Crypto Purchases
data.description: Binance has announced the integration of its Binance Wallet with Binance Connect, the exchange’s official fiat-to-crypto payment gateway. This update allows users to purchase cryptocurrencies directly using fiat currencies, significantly enhancing accessibility and convenience within the Binance ecosystem.Through this integration, users can now buy crypto instantly within the Binance Wallet interface using multiple payment options, including credit and debit cards, Apple Pay, Google Pay, and their Binance Spot account balance

data.title: Major TRUMP Whale Sells Off Tokens, Impacting Price
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, a significant TRUMP token holder, identified as EwkH5...rVmjP, has sold off their remaining 590,000 tokens at an average price of $10.62 over the past three hours. This sale, amounting to approximately $6.27 million, resulted in a loss of $1.677 million for the whale. The tokens were originally purchased between February 27 and March 15 at a cost of $13.46 each, leading to a nearly 20% reduction in the whale's position over the past month.

The large-scale sell-off has contributed to a further 3% decline in the TRUMP token's price, which is currently valued at $10.46.
